_comment: Tier-2 regression-replay weekly heartbeat. Copy to heartbeat-tasks/regression-replay-weekly.json to activate. Schedule with launchd via heartbeat-tasks/scripts/generate-plist.py (uses StartCalendarInterval cron). Sunday 02:00 default.
description: Runs each pinned seed N=3 times at T=0, judges each candidate vs baseline using PoLL (Sonnet + Codex), aggregates Pass^3. Writes a weekly scorecard and appends a tier-2 row to timeline.md. Cost: ~$10-18 per run with default 10-seed × 3-run × 2-judge matrix.
